---
toc: true
---

<!-- ARCHIVED: Content merged into homepage per redesign. Consider removing. -->

## Hi, I'm {{< var personal.nickname >}}

I'm an engineer and systems thinker working at the intersection of clean energy finance, geospatial analytics, data infrastructure, and AI. Whether the problem calls for portfolio performance analytics, computational modeling, or multi-agent research pipelines, the instinct is the same: find the repeatable pattern, then build the system that executes it reliably at scale.

## What I Build

### AI Engineering

I design and build multi-agent systems, intelligent pipelines, and developer tooling:

- **Clinical Research Automation**: LangGraph multi-agent pipeline screening academic literature with 99.3% recall at $1.16/review. Validated across 6,673 papers, co-authored with Johns Hopkins. In peer review.
- **Qualitative Research NLP**: On-device pipeline (Llama 3.2, Phi-3, Mistral) that recovered a trained researcher's complete 13-code qualitative framework from 17 clinical interview transcripts in under 25 minutes. Zero cost, no data leaves the machine. Manuscript in preparation.
- **AI Agent Infrastructure**: wipnote, a local-first coordination layer for AI coding agents. Go, open source on GitHub (earlier Python version published on PyPI as htmlgraph).
- **Political Media Analytics**: TiltHQ, tracking political creator coverage using Elixir/OTP. Each creator runs as an isolated GenServer. Phoenix LiveView dashboard, Oban background jobs, Claude-powered bias analysis.
- **Developer Environment Manager**: Skhiya, a Tauri desktop app (Rust + React) for managing .env files, SSH keys, and shell configs across projects. Atomic writes, conflict resolution, reusable templates.
- **Intelligent Developer Tools**: Contextune, a three-tier intent detection system (keyword, embeddings, semantic routing) with sub-millisecond matching and 81% cost reduction for AI coding agents.
- **Systems Analysis**: Data journalism platform on AI capital flows using system dynamics (PySD), Bayesian inference (PyMC), and interactive D3 visualizations.

### Enterprise Data Systems

At SunStrong Management (formerly Sunnova Energy), I built the data infrastructure powering $1B+ in renewable energy investments:

- Architected a geospatial analytics system that unlocked $250M in ITC credits by analyzing 200K+ solar assets across 29 states, identifying 70,000 qualifying systems ($2.5B value)
- Built 7 production ETL pipelines (Python, Dagster, DuckDB) delivering portfolio performance metrics for institutional investors with 99.9% reliability
- Automated IRS regulatory compliance so new tax rules became production code within 72 hours
- Delivered quarterly ITC certifications and compliance filings for Atlas SP Partners, Libremax Capital, and Blue Owl Capital

## My Journey

### Academic Path

I came to Duke University as a Mastercard Foundation Scholar to study Mechanical Engineering. At MIT, I earned my Master's in Technology & Policy, researching atmospheric mercury modeling. That work resulted in a peer-reviewed publication and confirmed what I already suspected: computational methods applied to the right problem can create outsized impact.

### How I Work

I'm an engineer and systems thinker. The throughline across everything I build is the same: find the repeatable pattern, design the system that executes it, then make it reliable at scale. Enterprise data pipelines, geospatial compliance systems, multi-agent research tools, interactive data journalism — these are different applications of the same engineering discipline. AI is one of the most powerful tools in that toolkit, but it's a tool, not an identity. Every system I build starts with the problem, not the technology.

## Beyond Work

### Social Innovation

Co-founder of The Knowledge Institute (TKI), which improved higher education access in Eswatini for over a decade. Our SASA platform won the MIT IDEAS Social Innovation Challenge.

### Technical Interests

- Multi-agent systems and AI orchestration
- Fault-tolerant distributed systems (Elixir/OTP, Phoenix)
- Data visualization and computational storytelling
- System dynamics modeling and policy analysis
- Open source (wipnote in Go; PyPI: flowmpl, contextune, htmlgraph | Hex: claude_code integration work)

## Let's Connect

I take on a small number of consulting engagements per quarter: clean energy data infrastructure, ITC/tax equity compliance, and AI pipelines for research institutions.

{{< include ../_includes/_contact-info.qmd >}}
